title: Creamy Citrusy Romantic White Flour Crumble
description: A low-calorie-friendly romantic Irish dish featuring strong white flour and a creamy citrus sauce to complement the bread-like texture.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup (95g) granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: To sweeten the white flour mixture

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for a natural citrus flavor

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup (120ml) whole milk or low-fat milk

instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, melted butter, and pinch of salt until well combined.
Fold in lemon juice and zest into the flour mixture to create a crumble dough.
Pour milk and cinnamon into a saucepan over medium heat. Stir until it comes to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and stir continuously for about 30 seconds or until thickened slightly, then remove from heat.
Pour the creamy sauce over the crumbled mixture in the bowl and gently mix using a fork to coat evenly.
Press the crumble dough into a greased baking dish (approx. 8x8 inches).
Bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown and set. Serve warm with a dollop of whipped cream if desired.
